name: Fresh Lemon and Cream Cheese Trifle
recipeIngredient: 2 (3.4 oz.) packages instant lemon pudding mix
8 ounces continuous frozen light whipped topping, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor bowl with metal blade, combine cream cheese, pudding mixes, skim milk, lemon peel, and lemon juice. Process until smooth.
2. Gently fold in whipped topping until well blended.
3. Arrange 1/3 cup of split ladyfingers in the bottom of a 13x9 inch (3 qt.) baking dish.
4. Spoon 1/3 of the pudding mixture evenly over the ladyfingers.
5. Repeat, forming two additional layers.
6. Cover with plastic wrap; refrigerate at least 4 hours or overnight.
7. If desired, garnish with thin lemon twists and fresh mint leaves before serving.
8. Store in refrigerator.
Makes 12 servings.
